name: Software Compatibility | openEuler
description: Enhance your project's efficiency by exploring compatibility options for software within the openEuler ecosystem.

name: openEuler Software Compatibility Test Process
description: openEuler provides a series of tools, documents, and operation procedures to help you test the compatibility between openEuler and software.

step.name: Create an issue
step.text: Create an issue under the oec-application project in the openEuler community and specify the software information in the issue. The SIG will give feedback on the issue in a timely manner.

step.name: Perform the compatibility test
step.text: After the issue is created, perform the compatibility test. openEuler provides the Compass-CI automated testing platform and user guide to help you complete the test.

step.name: Submit the result for review
step.text: After the compatibility test is completed and passed, update the test result to the issue. Include group_id in the issue.

step.name: Release the result
step.text: The SIG will review the submitted result and add the software to the Compatibility List after it is approved.
